error_signature: 404 error when accessing dynamic page via slug URL
title: 404 error on direct access to dynamic page with slug
symptom: When trying to access a dynamic page using its slug URL directly, a 404 error is displayed instead of the article content.
not_this_if: Accessing the page through the article list works fine
root_cause: The server configuration does not properly handle dynamic routing for slugs, leading to 404 errors when accessing URLs directly. This often requires specific settings in the server's configuration files to route requests correctly.
fix_steps: Configure the .htaccess file on your Apache server to handle dynamic routing
Ensure that the server is set to rewrite URLs correctly for slugs
agent_instruction: Update your .htaccess file to enable dynamic routing for slug URLs.
